label: ACMG/AMP Bayesian points (base)
description: Auditable default scoring configuration. Point values and tier cutoffs follow the ClinGen SVI Bayesian points framework (Tavtigian et al. 2020); REVEL bins follow the SVI-calibrated thresholds (Pejaver et al. 2022); allele-frequency cutoffs follow gnomAD popmax/FAF practice for BA1/BS1/PM2. These are the reviewable defaults; gene/disease/VCEP-specific deviations live under `overrides` and are resolved without code changes.

provenance.points_model: Tavtigian et al. 2020 (ClinGen SVI Bayesian points)
provenance.revel_bins: Pejaver et al. 2022 (ClinGen SVI calibrated REVEL thresholds)
provenance.frequency: gnomAD popmax/joint.faf95 practice for ACMG BA1/BS1/PM2
provenance.status: Governance-reviewed 2026-06-16 for source/spec drift. Not clinically approved until credentialed human sign-off is recorded in docs/clinical_review.md.

overrides.rationale: ClinGen PAH (Phenylketonuria) VCEP applies gene-specific BA1/BS1 frequency thresholds well below the 5%/1% ACMG defaults because common pathogenic PAH alleles reach appreciable population frequency.
overrides.source: ClinGen Phenylketonuria Expert Panel Specifications to the ACMG/AMP Variant Interpretation Guidelines for PAH Version 2.0.0, released 2024-07-16; CSpec https://erepo.clinicalgenome.org/cspec/ui/svi/doc/135637578; accessed 2026-06-16.

overrides.rationale: ClinGen Hearing Loss VCEP v2 uses autosomal-recessive hearing-loss thresholds of BA1 >=0.005 and BS1_Strong >=0.003 for the scoped hearing-loss genes, including GJB2. This replaces the earlier illustrative BS1-only 0.005 override.
overrides.source: ClinGen Hearing Loss Expert Panel Specifications to the ACMG/AMP Variant Interpretation Guidelines for CDH23, COCH, GJB2, KCNQ4, MYO6, MYO7A, SLC26A4, TECTA and USH2A Version 2.0.0, released 2022-03-30; CSpec https://cspec.genome.network/cspec/ui/svi/doc/GN005; accessed 2026-06-16.

overrides.rationale: Template only. A known founder pathogenic allele may require a per-variant frequency exception, but no active scoring threshold is changed here until a credentialed reviewer records the exact variant, founder population, evidence basis, and approval.
overrides.source: Local conflict-handling policy in docs/conflict_handling.md; not a ClinGen VCEP threshold.
